task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenC3 COSMOS web interface is visible in a browser window.

task_completion.description: YELLOW_HIGH limit for INST HEALTH_STATUS TEMP1 is lowered to trigger an anomaly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Command history, Limits Monitor, or Telemetry Viewer shows the YELLOW_HIGH limit for INST HEALTH_STATUS TEMP1 was modified or an out-of-limits alarm is active.

task_completion.description: INST CLEAR command is sent to reset latched violation counters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Command Sender or Command History shows the INST CLEAR command was executed.

task_completion.description: The simulated anomaly report JSON file is created at the correct location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'simulated_anomaly_report.json' is visible on the Desktop or open in a text editor at '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

task_completion.description: The JSON report contains all required fields and correct values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'simulated_anomaly_report.json' show a valid JSON structure with keys: target ('INST'), item ('TEMP1'), original_yellow_high, simulated_yellow_high, anomaly_start_time, anomaly_end_time, duration_seconds (>= 5.0), peak_value, and limits_restored (true).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with OpenC3 COSMOS to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using the OpenC3 COSMOS interface (e.g., Command Sender, Telemetry Viewer) rather than just typing a fake report.

integrity.description: The JSON report contains realistic telemetry data and timestamps
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON report contains realistic timestamps, temperature values, and limit values, not just placeholder text.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste a pre-made report
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen gathering the data (e.g., observing the peak temperature, noting timestamps) before writing the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: INST. Item: TEMP1. Output file: /home/ga/Desktop/simulated_anomaly_report.json. The task requires interacting with OpenC3 COSMOS to simulate an anomaly, send the INST CLEAR command, and document the results.
